title: Better Burning System
description: Adds escalating burn levels and realistic fire behavior.
body:
# _**Better Burning System(ingame: Better Burn Yourself, because it work on player)**_

Tired of fire being just “meh damage” in Minecraft?

This mod turns fire into a real survival threat — where burning isn’t just damage, it’s a progressive condition system that gets worse over time.

Version 1.0 showcase:
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oiV7KO32rNA](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oiV7KO32rNA)

This mod work on 1.21.x (NeoForge and Forge), 1.20.1 (Forge) and maybe work on 26.1.x Forge. If there is any problem, please contact me: linhhnt0711 (Discord)
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
**Burn System**

Fire is no longer instant damage.

When you get burned:

You gain Burn Levels
The higher it gets, the worse your condition becomes

Effects include:

Slowness I → V
Weakness I → II
Warning messages as your condition worsens

If you ignore it… you don’t just “take damage” — you spiral down.
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
**Survival Medical System**

You don’t just eat and wait anymore.

You must treat burns using real progression items:

GelKnife → used to extract materials
Raw Gelatin → Cooked Gelatin → crafting progression
Collagen Patch → main healing tool

👉 Healing becomes a decision, not automatic recovery.
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
**Gameplay Impact**
Fire is now a threat, not inconvenience
Survival becomes more strategic
Early game is more intense
Medical-style gameplay loop added
Important Note

This mod may not behave as expected in Creative Mode.
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
**Links**

CurseForge: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-burning-system](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-burning-system)

Have fun suffering \(`^-^)/
